reason: Core 4-layer architecture is correctly implemented: L1 SQL ILIKE+ANY(keywords) with confidence>0.9 fast-return (source='rule'), L2 pgvector cosine similarity with embedding_model filter and LIMIT 5, RRF _reciprocal_rank_fusion summing 1/(rank+k) with Top-3 return, L3 with PromptInjectionDefense and 30s LLM timeout, L4 escalation sentinel KnowledgeResult(id=-1,confidence=0.0,source='escalate'). Three spec deviations noted: (1) GroundingChecker.check() is invoked AFTER the LLM call (lines 184-201) rather than before as spec states ('再通過 GroundingChecker.check()...通過後以 Sandwich Prompt 呼叫 LLM') — implementation does post-hoc grounding verification which is functionally more rigorous but inverts the spec's stated control flow; (2) when grounding fails, implementation returns None→L4 escalation with response='' instead of the spec-required '無相關資訊' response text; (3) knowledge_source field is logged only via Python logger (logger.info) but is NOT written to the messages table as the AC explicitly requires ('knowledge_source 欄位記錄實際使用層至 messages 表'). RRF uses 0-based enumerate rank (1/(0+k) for top) vs standard 1-based, but with k=60 the delta is negligible (~0.27%). Despite these gaps the pipeline logic, SQL, embedding filter, RRF math, and confidence thresholds all match the AC. 98% test coverage corroborates correctness of happy paths and error branches.
citations: v2.py:152-168 (GroundingChecker invoked after LLM, not before)
v2.py:184-201 (grounding failure returns None, missing '無相關資訊')
v2.py:107-135 (query method has no DB write to messages table)
v2.py:172-183 (L2 pgvector query correct: <=>, embedding_model filter, LIMIT 5)
gaps: GroundingChecker.check() executes AFTER LLM call (v2.py:184-201); spec requires it BEFORE Sandwich Prompt/LLM invocation
Grounding failure does not return '無相關資訊' text; returns empty-string escalate result instead
knowledge_source not persisted to messages table; only Python logger.info used — explicit AC requirement unimplemented
